projects.name: MTK Screws
projects.description: A B2B manufacturer site for a 40-year-old fastener exporter, turning a dense product catalogue into a clear, trust-building sales channel.

preview.heading: Built for Trust
preview.subheading: Premium fasteners. 40 years of engineering excellence.

testimonials.quote: WebGraha rebuilt our site in under three weeks and it actually feels premium now — not just faster. Every revision request was handled the same day.
testimonials.name: Aanya Rao

testimonials.quote: Communication was the difference. No agency-speak, no five-person hand-off chain — just clear updates and a site that matched the brief exactly.
testimonials.name: Daniel Kim
